CustomField.description: Enables the Enhanced Recurring Donations engine, which replaces the legacy model with improved installment management, status automation, and flexible scheduling. WARNING: Must be enabled through NPPatch Settings, not directly in Custom Settings, because the migration process requires data conversion steps. Enabling directly in Custom Settings can cause data inconsistencies.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enables Enhanced Recurring Donations. IMPORTANT: Enable through NPPatch Settings, not directly here, to avoid data inconsistencies.
CustomField.label: Enhanced Recurring Donations
